name: gauntlet
description: Adversarial review-to-merge pipeline: sweep, verify, fan out, gate, merge.

interface.longDescription: Review code, address Copilot feedback, and gate pull requests through independent reviews and CI.
defaultPrompt: Gate these pull requests through review and CI.
